auth.inviteCodeHint: Have a code from a partner? Enter it to join their household

common.autoSharedNote: This will be shared with your household — both of you can see and edit it.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your spending
dashboard.noIncomeHint: Add income entries to see the split.
dashboard.noSpendingHint: Add an expense to see the breakdown.
dashboard.noBudgetSpendingHint: Spend in a budgeted category to see it ranked here.
dashboard.noTransactionsHint: Your most recent expenses will show up here.

income.title: Income
income.subtitle: Track money coming in
income.noIncomeHint: Add your first income entry to get started.

recurring.title: Recurring
recurring.subtitle: Templates that auto-generate a transaction every month
recurring.dayOfMonthHint: Capped at 1–28 so it always exists, even in February.
recurring.noIncomeHint: e.g. a monthly salary that repeats automatically.
recurring.noExpensesHint: e.g. rent or a subscription that repeats automatically.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Recurring expenses you've flagged as subscriptions
subscriptions.noSubscriptionsHint: Add Netflix, a gym membership, insurance, or anything else that bills you monthly.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Deeper look at your spending patterns

forecast.title: Cash Flow Forecast
forecast.subtitle: Projected cash flow based on your active recurring income and expenses
forecast.projectedPositive: Based on your recurring entries, you're projected to save {{amount}} over the next {{months}} months, ending with a projected balance of {{balance}}.
forecast.projectedNegative: Based on your recurring entries, you're projected to lose {{amount}} over the next {{months}} months, ending with a projected balance of {{balance}}.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Set a monthly limit per category
budgets.overAllocated: You've allocated {{amount}} more than your income this month.
budgets.canSpend: If you earn {{income}} and want to save {{goal}}, you can spend {{amount}} per month.

networth.title: Net Worth
networth.subtitle: Manually tracked assets and liabilities
networth.balanceHint: Always a positive number - liabilities are subtracted automatically.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: About this app
settings.appearanceDesc: Pick a color theme - it applies instantly and works in both light and dark mode (use the sun/moon button in the top-right to switch modes).
settings.currencyNote: This only changes how amounts are displayed. It does not convert any values.
settings.localStorageNote: Theme, color palette, and your selected currency are stored locally in your browser and aren't shared between devices.
settings.householdDesc: Share expenses with your partner or family
settings.inviteCodeHint: Share this code with your partner
settings.removeMemberConfirm: Remove this member from the household? They will lose access to the household's shared data.
settings.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this household?
settings.notInHousehold: You are not in a shared household yet

savings.onTrack: You're saving {{actual}} of your {{goal}} goal — on track!
savings.short: You're saving {{actual}} of your {{goal}} goal — {{short}} short.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account information
profile.errorSave: Failed to save. Please try again.

investments.title: Investments
investments.subtitle: Track your investment portfolio
investments.noFundsHint: Add your first investment fund to see compound growth projections.
investments.annualReturnHint: Expected annual growth rate before fees
investments.noSalary: No income recorded — enter a flat monthly amount

security.question: Security question
security.answerNote: Case-insensitive. You'll use this to recover your account.
security.newAnswer: New answer (leave blank to keep current)

questions.pet: What was the name of your first pet?
questions.city: What city were you born in?
questions.maiden: What is your mother's maiden name?
questions.school: What was the name of your elementary school?

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to recover your account.
forgotPassword.success: Password reset successfully! You can now log in with your new password.
forgotPassword.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait 15 minutes and try again.
forgotPassword.emailNotFound: If that email is registered and has a security question set, it will appear here.
forgotPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
